overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character exploring an abandoned, foggy subway station with graffiti-covered walls and flickering fluorescent lights. The character navigates through the concourse, checks lockers for items, and proceeds to a platform with an abandoned train car visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned subway concourse with debris and graffiti-covered walls

events.description: character approaches and opens a metal locker to search for items inside

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through the station concourse with flashlight and gun drawn, sweeping light across the debris and graffiti-covered walls

entered.detail: large structural support columns throughout the concourse
wall covered in dense black and white graffiti tags and writing
scattered trash and paper litter covering the tile floor
overhead fluorescent tube lights emitting greenish illumination
bank of gray metal storage lockers against the wall
illuminated advertisement poster with text about writing

segments.scene_description: The character explores a wide, abandoned subway concourse filled with debris and covered in graffiti. Overhead fluorescent lights cast a greenish glow over the scene as the character approaches and searches a bank of metal lockers.

scene_state.functional_zone: gated corridor transition to subway platform

events.description: passes through a metal security gate from the main concourse into the platform area

agents.ego_description: moving through a metal gate into the restricted platform area, transitioning from the open concourse

entered.detail: black metal security gate with vertical bars separating concourse from platform
yellow safety line marking the edge of the subway platform
dark subway tracks running parallel to the platform

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow gated corridor, leaving the main concourse behind. The space becomes more enclosed as the platform edge and railway tracks come into view.

scene_state.functional_zone: subway platform with abandoned train car

events.description: abandoned subway train car comes into view along the right side of the platform
character opens a second locker near the train to collect an item from inside

agents.ego_description: walking along the platform edge, examining the abandoned train car with flashlight and checking storage lockers

entered.detail: silver subway train car numbered 9467 with American flag decal, doors closed
wooden and metal bench on the platform for waiting passengers
wall-mounted electrical boxes and conduits with warning signs

segments.scene_description: The character explores the subway platform where an abandoned train car sits on the tracks. The flashlight illuminates the graffiti-covered walls and platform bench as the character checks another locker for supplies before continuing down the platform.

scene_state.functional_zone: dim service corridor toward station exit

events.description: lighting dims significantly as character enters the darker exit corridor

agents.ego_description: proceeding through a narrow, dark service corridor toward the station exit, passing under dim emergency lighting

entered.detail: green illuminated sign reading 'NOT IN SERVICE' hanging from ceiling
red exit sign with arrow pointing toward stairs
metal door with mesh window leading to service areas

segments.scene_description: The character enters a darker, narrower corridor leading toward the exit. A green 'NOT IN SERVICE' sign glows overhead as the lighting shifts to low emergency illumination, creating a more confined and ominous atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a decaying subway station that shifts from a wide, debris-strewn concourse into a claustrophobic, dimly lit exit corridor. It begins in a spacious area under a greenish fluorescent glow, where the camera follows the character as they search a bank of metal lockers amidst graffiti-covered walls. As the character moves forward, the space tightens into a narrow gated corridor that opens up to reveal the railway tracks and a desolate platform. The scene then expands across the platform to illuminate an abandoned train car and a lonely bench before the camera turns away from the tracks. Finally, the environment contracts into a dark, narrow passage where the lighting shifts to low emergency illumination under the ominous glow of a green NOT IN SERVICE sign.
